title: agent.json
description: Agent-Ready Syndication (ARS) manifest. Describes what a website or service offers to AI agents — capabilities, actions, policies, and endpoints.

name.description: Human-readable name of the service or brand

version.description: Version of this agent.json file (semver). Increment when capabilities change.

spec_version.description: Version of the agent.json specification this file conforms to

description.description: Natural-language summary of what this service does. Write for an AI agent that needs to decide whether this service is relevant to a user's request.
examples: Premium fashion retailer with 2,000+ products across women's and men's collections

capabilities.description: What an agent can do with this service. Each capability is a discrete unit of functionality.

actions.description: Detailed action definitions with input/output schemas. More granular than capabilities — these are the specific operations agents can invoke.

data_schemas.description: Structured data types this service exposes. Helps agents understand the shape of data they'll receive.

authentication.description: How agents authenticate with this service

policies.description: Rate limits, data handling rules, and business policies agents must respect

brand_voice.description: Guidelines for how agents should represent this brand in conversations

endpoints.description: Protocol-specific endpoints agents can connect to

humans.description: When and how to escalate from agent interaction to human support

nlweb.description: NLWeb compatibility layer for services that also support the NLWeb protocol

regions.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where service operates

updated.description: When this agent.json was last updated

description.description: Natural-language description of what this capability does. Be specific — agents use this to decide whether to invoke it.

type.description: query = read-only data retrieval. action = state-changing operation. subscription = real-time updates. negotiation = multi-turn agent-to-agent interaction.

tags.description: Freeform tags for categorization and discovery

name.description: Machine-readable action identifier, should match a capability name

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the expected input parameters

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the response structure

idempotent.description: Whether calling this action multiple times with the same input produces the same result

destructive.description: Whether this action makes irreversible changes

requires_confirmation.description: Whether the agent should confirm with the user before invoking

examples.description: Example invocations with input and expected output

schema.description: JSON Schema definition for this data type

registration_url.description: Where agents can register for API access

rate_limit.description: Global rate limit for agent interactions

data_handling.description: How agent platforms should handle interaction data

terms_url.description: Link to full terms of service for agent interactions

allowed_agents.description: Allowlist of agent platforms (empty = all allowed)

business_policies.description: Domain-specific business rules agents must respect

BrandVoice.description: Guidelines for how agents represent this brand. This is a novel addition to web specs — it governs the agent's conversational behavior when discussing your brand.

prohibited.description: Topics, claims, or associations the brand wants agents to avoid

required_disclosures.description: Statements that must accompany certain interactions (legal, regulatory)

preferred_name.description: How the brand should be referred to in conversation

messaging_guidelines_url.description: Link to full brand messaging guidelines

Endpoints.description: Protocol-specific endpoints. Include at least one.

mcp.description: MCP server endpoint (SSE or streamable HTTP)

websocket.description: WebSocket endpoint for real-time agent communication

HumanEscalation.description: When and how agent interactions should escalate to humans

triggers.description: Conditions that should trigger human escalation

handoff_protocol.description: How context is transferred from agent to human

NLWebCompat.description: NLWeb protocol compatibility settings (R.V. Guha's proposal)

schema_types.description: Schema.org types this service exposes via NLWeb

ask_endpoint.description: NLWeb /ask endpoint for natural language queries
